suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-06-01. CVE-2026-33117 applies to key vault vulnerabilities in the Azure Storage SDK. We don't uses the key vault vuncinality within our codebase instead platform injects them into our PODs via environment variables. We should none the less reguallrly review this one such that once a fix is avaialble we apply it

Reviewed 2026-04-01. CVE-2025-15104 relates to nu.validator:validator, which is not present in this repo's runtime classpath. Keep this suppression only for Dependency-Check false positives where validator libraries are mapped to the generic CPE "validator:validator". Runtime review found org.hibernate.validator:hibernate-validator:9.0.1.Final and com.networknt:json-schema-validator:1.5.9, but no nu.validator:validator dependency.

Reviewed 2026-05-22. CVE-2025-21199 applies to Microsoft Azure Agent Installer products under the CPE family cpe:2.3:a:microsoft:azure_agent:* and the NVD affected-software entries are for the "backup" and "site_recovery" products. This repo contains the Java libraries com.microsoft.azure:applicationinsights-core and com.microsoft.azure:applicationinsights-web, which are being mapped to the generic azure_agent CPE by Dependency-Check. Keep this suppression only for that false-positive CPE match.

Reviewed 2026-05-22. User-service uses Azure Blob Storage only for reading the role-mapping file via BlobServiceClientBuilder.connectionString(...), then reading blob properties and content. Current runtime artifacts flagged for CVE-2026-33117 are: - com.azure:azure-core:1.58.0 - com.azure:azure-core-http-netty:1.16.4 - com.azure:azure-json:1.5.1 Maven metadata review found these are already the latest stable GA releases available in the current Azure Storage SDK chain used by this repo, with no newer non-beta upgrade path. This suppression expires in two weeks so the dependency-check failure returns unless an upstream GA fix or a better remediation path is available.
